title: lib/input
description: This directory contains classes for reading input data in various formats. The classes in this directory collaborate to provide a flexible and extensible framework for processing different types of input data. The KeyValueLineRecordReader class treats a line in the input as a key/value pair separated by a separator character, while the KeyValueTextInputFormat class breaks the input files into lines and divides each line into key and value parts. The NLineInputFormat class splits N lines of input as one split. These classes play a crucial role in the Hadoop MapReduce architecture by enabling efficient and scalable processing of large datasets.
